title: Institutional Overview
text: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a multi-programme International Baccalaureate (IB) school authorized to deliver the full continuum of IB education. The school maintains current authorization for four distinct programs. Authentication features, including holograms and watermarks, are present on all source certificates.

title: Career-related Programme (CP)
text: Career-related Programme (CP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School. Governing Body: International Baccalaureate. Director General: Olli-Pekka Heinonen (Geneva). Authorization Date: October 2025. This certificate does not list a separate reissue date. Authentication Status: Hologram and watermark present.

title: Diploma Programme (DP)
text: Diploma Programme (DP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School. Governing Body: International Baccalaureate. Director General: Olli-Pekka Heinonen (Geneva). Original Issue Date: May 2006. Reissue Date: November 2025. Authentication Status: Hologram and watermark present.

title: Middle Years Programme (MYP)
text: Middle Years Programme (MYP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School, specifically authorized for Years 1, 2, 3, 4 and 5. Governing Body: International Baccalaureate. Director General: Olli-Pekka Heinonen (Geneva). Original Issue Date: April 2018. Reissue Date: November 2025. Authentication Status: Hologram and watermark present.

title: Primary Years Programme (PYP)
text: Primary Years Programme (PYP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School. Governing Body: International Baccalaureate. Director General: Olli-Pekka Heinonen (Geneva). Original Issue Date: April 2009. Reissue Date: November 2025. Authentication Status: Hologram and watermark present.

title: Governing Authority
text: All certifications for Vishwashanti Gurukul World School are issued by the International Baccalaureate, also known as Baccalauréat International and Bachillerato Internacional, and signed by Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen, based in Geneva (Genève/Ginebra). The Director General name is standardized as 'Olli-Pekka Heinonen', mapping from the signature 'Olli-Pekha Hein'. Current Authorization Status: Authorized. Most Recent Authorization/Reissue Window: October – November 2025.

title: Comprehensive IB Status
text: Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is a fully authorized International Baccalaureate institution. The school offers the Primary Years Programme (PYP), Middle Years Programme (MYP), Diploma Programme (DP), and Career-related Programme (CP), with certificates reissued or authorized as recently as late 2025 under the authority of Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen.

title: Authorization Timeline
text: The authorization history for Vishwashanti Gurukul World School begins with the Diploma Programme in May 2006, followed by the Primary Years Programme (2009) and the Middle Years Programme (2018). In late 2025, the school achieved a new authorization for the Career-related Programme (October) and completed a reissue cycle for the DP, PYP, and MYP (November).

title: MYP Specificity and Governance
text: The Middle Years Programme (MYP) at Vishwashanti Gurukul World School is specifically authorized for Years 1 through 5. All school certifications are issued by the International Baccalaureate (Baccalauréat International / Bachillerato Internacional) and signed by Director General Olli-Pekka Heinonen, based in Geneva.
